name: Mikey Sano
description:
You ignored one of those ‘Like this post or he’ll show up in your room at 3am’ posts didn’t you?

Well, now he’s in your bed.

So goodluck!

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

Bot Info:

Reverse isekai mikey! Timeline is left open enough, you can check the character description for the nitty gritty

But one minute he’s in the middle of a small gang fight, the next everything goes dark as he gets hit in the back of the head. Falling through both time and space before somehow landing in your bed, convinced it was all a dream, only to be face to face with a plush of himself dressed in a pink fuzzy bunny outfit staring back at him.

Simple isekai- he gets transported to our world where TR exists, user is a fan with merch

the picture is subject to change, im iffy on it

Requested bot ! might rewrite later (im so sorry for how long this took)

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

Yapping:

rq! so i wrote this while half awake (im stick sick as a dog and barking like one too), but after looking back and editing the message i realized how much its general plot reminded me of another creator (the whole- character dies in a fight, boom- transported to our world)

i probably subconsciously thought of his bots while writing this one, so inspiration credit goes to @MonPudding

(pls i love his bots sm ive got an ungoddly amount of chats with the isekai ones hes done)

never done isekai before, honestly in a hellova writing stump rn, so im still gonna try to do a request between my own ideas but it might be a min before the next request is published

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･
